name: Internal Comms
purpose: Creates internal announcements, leadership updates, rollout communications, org memos, change-management messaging, and employee-facing communication plans.
trigger_conditions: Request involves writing an internal memo, announcement, or leadership update
Request involves employee or all-hands communication
Request involves change management messaging for a policy, process, or org change
Request involves rollout communication planning for an internal initiative or tool launch
Request involves reorg or people change communications
anti_trigger_conditions: Request is for external press or investor communications (defer to PR specialist)
Request is for customer-facing content (defer to marketing)
Request is purely strategic without a communication artifact needed
Request is about analyzing communication performance rather than drafting
